Subscriptions are created on the Reactive Network; `react` runs in the ReactVM.","kind":"dev","methods":{"pay(uint256)":{"details":"Make sure to check the msg.sender.","params":{"amount":"Amount owed due to reactive transactions and/or callbacks."}}},"stateVariables":{"SWAP_TOPIC_0":{"details":"keccak256(\"Swap(bytes32,address,int128,int128,uint160,uint128,int24,uint24)\")"}},"title":"MaestroManagerRSC","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"coverDebt()":{"notice":"Automatically cover the outstanding debt to the system contract or callback proxy, provided the contract has sufficient funds."},"pay(uint256)":{"notice":"Method called by the system contract and/or proxies when payment is due."},"react((uint256,address,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,bytes,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256,uint256))":{"notice":"Handle a Swap event: derive a concentration band around the new tick and trigger a reposition."}},"notice":"The autonomous brain of Maestro's pool manager, living on the Reactive Network.         It subscribes to the Uniswap v4 PoolManager `Swap` event for a specific pool on the         origin chain. Whenever the price moves, it computes a fresh concentration band around         the new tick and triggers a cross-chain callback to the ManagerCallback contract on         the destination chain \u2014 repositioning the pool's liquidity with no human in the
